To better assist you, please provide the following information:
- Which SAP Certificaion is you enquiry related to? (Please specify the exact exam name or code, if known)
- In detail, the type of support your require (e.g. purchasing exam attempts, content advice, Stay Certified program, etc)

To better assist you, please provide the following information:
- Course code
- Course dates
- Instructor-led class (in-person or virtual option)
- In detail, the assistance you require

To better assist you, please provide the following information:
- Certification name or exam code
- Donor Universal ID (the Universal ID to which the certification is bound to at the moment)
- Receiver Universal ID (the Universal ID to which you would like to transfer your certification)
Please note: there must be at least two email addresses (with different domains) linked to each Universal ID

To better assist you, please provide the following information:
Are you already an SAP authorised Education Partner?
If yes: Please describe your specific requirement in details (e.g. ordering a private partner class, scheduling on-demand partner managed courses, reselling SAP Learning Hub, etc)
If no: Is your inquiry related to becoming an SAP authorised Education Partner?
Other: If your inquiry does not fall into the above topics, please provide a detailed description of the assistance you require

To better assist you, please provide the following information:
- Details about the assistance required (e.g. content advice, purchasing SAP Learning Hub, renewal/upsell/termination advice, etc.)
- If your inquiry relates to an existing contract, please share the relevant contract/order ID

To better assist you, please provide the following information:
- Which SAP product or exact course, learning journey from learning.sap.com is your inquiry related to?
- In detail, the assistance you require

- Company name
- Number of participants

- Course language

To better assist you, please provide the following information:
For SAP partners,
- Are you already an SAP authorised People to Work partner, or are you aiming to become one?
For private individuals,
- Are you an individual currently between jobs and interested in publicly funded SAP training?
- Are you currently participating or have you recently completed a funded course in a People to Work class?
Other
- If your request does not fall under any of the above categories, please provide a detailed description of the assistance you require.

This category is for queries related to SAP Learning Class (instructor-led training) bookings and orders, including payment options queries.

Please provide the following information (wherever applicable) for efficient support:

  • Shopping Cart ID
  • Contact Person ID / S-user ID / P-user ID
  • Company Name
  • Email
  • Course Code / ID
  • Course Dates

For invoice corrections, please reach out to Cash Collection team (contact details can be found on your invoice).

This category is for queries related to SAP Certification subscriptions purchased on SAP Training Shop, including payment options queries, or for queries related to SAP Certification Activation Code redemption.

Please provide the following information (wherever applicable) for efficient support.

  • Shopping Cart ID / Activation Code
  • Contact Person ID / S-user ID / P-user ID
  • Company Name
  • Email
  • Course Code / ID

For invoice corrections, please reach out to Cash Collection team (contact details can be found on your invoice).

If you cannot access your SAP Certification subscription or schedule an exam, please raise a case with Technical Queries service category.

For queries related to orders or purchases made via sap.com/SAP Store for SAP Learning Hub or SAP Certification exam, two attempts, including invoicing, renewals and cancellations, please reach out to SAP Store team using the following link:

https://store.sap.com/dcp/en/supportform
